component.name: CoreMetrics
component.summary: Cross-platform desktop system monitor (CPU / RAM / GPU / processes)

description.p: CoreMetrics is a small C++23 system monitor built directly on raw SDL3 pixel surfaces. It shows live CPU, RAM, GPU, and per-process resource usage with an optional rolling sparklines view and an htop-style kill flow on the Processes tab.

No Qt, no Electron, no JavaScript runtime. Every widget is hand-rasterized by code in this repository. Three native metrics backends (Linux /proc, macOS Mach + IOKit, Windows PDH) are selected at compile time so the same source tree builds the same UI on each platform.

screenshot.caption: System tab with CPU / RAM / GPU bars and per-logical-CPU strip
Sortable Processes table with real per-process CPU%

description.p: AssetPath resolver, htop-style row selection and kill, per-logical-CPU bar strip, dynamic README contribution badge, install-path badges.
First tagged release: overnight wave + tag-driven release pipeline + Homebrew tap.
